      <rect x="9.1" y="2.5" width="4.4" height="4.4" />
      <rect x="9.1" y="9.1" width="4.4" height="4.4" />
      <rect x="2.5" y="9.1" width="4.4" height="4.4" />
    </g>

</template>

<script lang="ts">

</script>
